items.name_en: #BottegaVenetaBottega Veneta Solstice Shoulder Bag, the latest style, comes with a matching small bag inside
items.name_cn:
#BottegaVenetaBottega Veneta Solstice Shoulder Bag, the latest style, comes with a matching small bag inside
A very casual style 🔥
High-end feel, a quiet and simple bag from the BV show collection, the "Solstice"
Deep green, black, and ice cream colors present different beauties
Paired with jewelry-grade craftsmanship braids, presenting a unique high-end feel under the collision of soft leather and metal
Elegant, casual, and unique
Style No.: 740990
Size: 29*3*52cm

items.name_cn:
#D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag 'Monogram with Leather'
This D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag is a new addition to the 2025 Spring-Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, offering a modern silhouette that enriches the D-Vibe line. Crafted with care from materials like blue Oblique print fabric, it highlights the Oblique print and is accented with smooth calfskin details. A practical style with a slip pocket for easy storage of daily essentials, featuring a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Zip closure
1 compartment
Internal slip pocket
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 2388
Dimensions: 20.5 x 13 x 5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
#June Box#
YSL's new JUNE quilted calfskin box bag. The small body has a nice amount of space. The bag features a front flap and a structured bucket shape. The craftsmanship is extremely complex, featuring a Y-letter swirl design and diamond quilting. Fashion is truly a cycle; this new small box bag has a bright vintage look!!
 Dimensions: 19 X 15 X 8 cm

specs.rawTitle:

 Dimensions: 19 X 15 X 8 cm

#June Box# Silver Buckle

Size: 19 X 15 X 8 cm

items.name_cn:
#Medium Signature Bucket Bag in Black
This Signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features tonal pebbled leather details and a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious compartment features a snap closure and leather strap opening, offering a secure place for daily essentials, with an interior pocket for added refinement. The medium size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing for easy carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Metal snap closure and leather strap opening; top leather handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap; interior pocket
Model: 2366
Dimensions: 24×21×14cm (L×H×W)
Fits 1 smartphone, 1 wallet, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
#New Arrival Christmas Edition
Medium Book Tote Handbag
Gold metallic thread embroidery of Dior Jardin d'Hiver pattern (36 x 27.5 x 16.5 cm)
Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a mainstay piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Embroidered with the Dior Jardin d'Hiver pattern throughout and accented with gold metallic thread for a touch of elegance, this poetic design interprets Monsieur Dior's tapestry. It fits various daily items. The medium size features a CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or on the shoulder.
Front features CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo
Includes dust bag
Style: 8001
